title: cyperus tomaiophyllus var. alpestris
intro: Cyperus tomaiophyllus var. alpestris is a variant of the Cyperus tomaiophyllus plant, commonly known as the alpine umbrella sedge or dwarf umbrella sedge. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus tomaiophyllus var. alpestris include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
